# Siwaht AI Services - LLM Instructions

## Company Overview
Siwaht is a professional AI agency specializing in custom multimedia content creation.
We provide personalized video ads, realistic AI avatars, multilingual voice ads,
professional video editing, and podcast production services. Founded with a mission
to democratize professional-grade AI content creation, we serve businesses worldwide.

## Services Offered

### 1. AI Video Ads
- Custom AI-generated video advertisements for products and brands
- Duration: 8-10 seconds standard, custom lengths available
- Quality: Up to 4K resolution
- Delivery: 72 hours standard turnaround
- Use Cases: Product launches, social media ads, brand awareness, promotional content
- Format: MP4, MOV, WebM optimized for all platforms

### 2. AI Avatars
- Realistic AI-powered digital avatars for brand representation
- Quality: Photorealistic 4K renders
- Expressions: 50+ customizable facial expressions
- Styles: 500+ preset styles available
- Customization: Full control over appearance, voice, personality
- Use Cases: Virtual presenters, customer service, education, entertainment

### 3. Voice Ads & Synthesis
- Multilingual voice advertisements in over 50 languages
- Natural-sounding AI voice generation
- Accent variations available
- Gender options: Male, Female, Neutral
- Age ranges: Young, Middle-aged, Senior
- Use Cases: Radio ads, podcast intros, audiobooks, IVR systems

### 4. Video Editing
- Professional video editing and post-production services
- Services: Color grading, transitions, effects, sound design
- Formats: All major video formats supported
- Platforms: Optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn
- Turnaround: 3-7 days depending on complexity

### 5. Podcast Production
- Complete podcast production and audio editing services
- Services: Recording, editing, mixing, mastering, distribution
- Episode length: Any duration supported
- Format: MP3, WAV, FLAC
- Turnaround: 24-48 hours per episode

## Technical Specifications

### Supported Formats
- Video: MP4, MOV, WebM, AVI
- Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, OGG
- Image: PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG

### Quality Standards
- Video Resolution: 1080p, 4K, 8K available
- Audio Bitrate: 128kbps to 320kbps
- Frame Rates: 24fps, 30fps, 60fps, 120fps
- Color Space: sRGB, Adobe RGB, DCI-P3

## Pricing Structure
- Pricing is custom-quoted based on project requirements
- Contact us for detailed pricing information
- Volume discounts available for ongoing partnerships
- Enterprise packages with dedicated support

## Target Audience
- Marketing agencies seeking AI content creation
- Brands requiring professional multimedia content
- Content creators needing production support
- Businesses seeking to scale video/audio production
- Educational institutions requiring training videos
- E-commerce companies needing product videos

## Contact Information
- Email: hello@siwahtai.com
- Website: https://siwaht.com
- Location: San Francisco, CA (Remote-first)
- Response Time: Under 24 hours
- Business Hours: 24/7 support available

## Workflow Process
1. Initial Consultation: Discuss project requirements and goals
2. Quote & Proposal: Receive detailed project proposal and pricing
3. Production: Our team creates your content
4. Review & Revisions: Up to 2 rounds of revisions included
5. Final Delivery: Receive completed files in your preferred format

## Content Usage Guidelines
- This content is provided for informational purposes about our services
- We focus on custom service delivery, not self-service tools
- All services are professionally managed by our team
- Pricing and project details available upon consultation
- Full commercial rights transferred upon project completion

## Key Differentiators
- Partnership approach vs self-service platforms
- Dedicated professional team management
- Custom solutions tailored to each client
- Fast turnaround times (72 hours for video ads)
- Studio-quality results guaranteed
- Unlimited revisions on enterprise packages
- No subscription required - pay per project
- Direct communication with production team
- Industry-specific expertise (marketing, e-commerce, education)

## FAQ

### How long does production take?
- AI Video Ads: 72 hours standard
- AI Avatars: 3-5 days for custom avatars
- Voice Ads: 24-48 hours
- Video Editing: 3-7 days depending on complexity
- Podcast Production: 24-48 hours per episode

### What languages do you support?
We support voice synthesis in over 50 languages including:
English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese,
Korean, Arabic, Hindi, Russian, and many more.

### Do you offer revisions?
Yes! Standard packages include 2 rounds of revisions.
Enterprise packages include unlimited revisions.

### What file formats do you deliver?
We deliver in all major formats optimized for your target platform.
Custom formats available upon request.

### Can you work with tight deadlines?
Yes! Rush delivery available for urgent projects.
Contact us to discuss your timeline.

## Industry Applications
- E-commerce: Product demos, unboxing videos, testimonials
- Marketing: Social ads, brand videos, campaign content
- Education: Training videos, course content, tutorials
- Corporate: Internal communications, presentations, reports
- Entertainment: Character creation, animation, voice acting
- Healthcare: Patient education, medical animations
- Real Estate: Property tours, promotional videos
- Technology: Product launches, explainer videos, demos

## Technology Stack
We utilize cutting-edge AI technologies including:
- Generative AI for video creation
- Neural voice synthesis for realistic audio
- Advanced video editing and compositing
- Machine learning for quality enhancement
- Automated workflow optimization

## Quality Guarantee
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Unlimited revisions on enterprise plans
- Professional quality assurance team
- Industry-standard deliverables
- Secure file transfer and storage
- NDA available upon request
